name: Climate.Pid → Autotune
description: This action starts the autotune process of the PID controller.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: ID of the PID Climate to start autotuning for.

config_entries.label: Negative Output
config_entries.description: The negative output power to drive the cool output at. Defaults to `-1.0`.

config_entries.label: Noiseband
config_entries.description: The noiseband of the process (=sensor) variable. The value of the PID controller must be able to reach this value. Defaults to `0.25`.

config_entries.label: Positive Output
config_entries.description: The positive output power to drive the heat output at. Defaults to `1.0`.
